examples.en: We found a quiet campsite near the river.
examples.zh: 我們在河邊找到一個安靜的營地。

examples.en: The campsite has clean toilets and showers.
examples.zh: 這個營地有乾淨的廁所和淋浴間。

img: tents on grassy campsite by river

examples.en: It took us an hour to set up the tent.
examples.zh: 我們花了一小時搭好帳篷。

examples.en: Two people can sleep in this tent.
examples.zh: 這頂帳篷可以睡兩個人。

img: orange dome tent in forest

examples.en: My sleeping bag keeps me warm at night.
examples.zh: 我的睡袋讓我晚上很暖和。

examples.en: Roll up your sleeping bag before we leave.
examples.zh: 出發前把你的睡袋捲起來。

img: rolled up sleeping bag inside tent

examples.en: She carried all her gear in a large backpack.
examples.zh: 她把所有裝備都裝在一個大背包裡。

examples.en: My backpack feels heavy after two hours.
examples.zh: 走了兩小時後我的背包覺得很重。

img: hiker wearing large mountain backpack

examples.en: Hiking is a great way to enjoy nature.
examples.zh: 健行是享受大自然的好方法。

examples.en: We went hiking every weekend last summer.
examples.zh: 去年夏天我們每個週末都去健行。

img: people hiking on mountain trail

examples.en: This trail leads to the top of the hill.
examples.zh: 這條步道通往山頂。

examples.en: Stay on the trail so you don't get lost.
examples.zh: 走在步道上才不會迷路。

img: narrow dirt trail through green forest

examples.en: A compass always points to the north.
examples.zh: 指南針總是指向北方。

examples.en: He used a compass to find the right way.
examples.zh: 他用指南針找到正確的方向。

img: metal compass held in hand outdoors

examples.en: Bring a flashlight for the night walk.
examples.zh: 夜間散步要帶手電筒。

examples.en: The flashlight ran out of batteries.
examples.zh: 手電筒沒電了。

img: hand holding bright flashlight at night

examples.en: We sat around the campfire and told stories.
examples.zh: 我們圍著營火講故事。

examples.en: Never leave a campfire burning alone.
examples.zh: 絕不要讓營火無人看管地燃燒。

img: glowing campfire at night with logs

examples.en: A lantern lit up the inside of the tent.
examples.zh: 一盞營燈照亮了帳篷內部。

examples.en: Hang the lantern on this hook.
examples.zh: 把營燈掛在這個鉤子上。

img: glowing camping lantern on wooden table

examples.en: We cooked soup on a small camping stove.
examples.zh: 我們用小型露營爐煮湯。

examples.en: The gas stove is easy to carry.
examples.zh: 這個瓦斯爐很好攜帶。

img: portable camping gas stove with flame

examples.en: We put the meat on the grill.
examples.zh: 我們把肉放在烤架上。

examples.en: Let's grill some corn tonight.
examples.zh: 今晚我們來烤一些玉米吧。

img: food cooking on outdoor barbecue grill

examples.en: Pack all your camping gear in the car.
examples.zh: 把所有露營裝備裝進車裡。

examples.en: Good gear makes a trip more comfortable.
examples.zh: 好的裝備讓旅程更舒適。

img: camping gear laid out on ground

examples.en: Trekking in the mountains takes several days.
examples.zh: 在山中長途跋涉需要好幾天。

examples.en: We bought new boots for trekking.
examples.zh: 我們為長途健行買了新靴子。

img: hikers trekking across mountain ridge

examples.en: We reached the summit before noon.
examples.zh: 我們在中午前登上了山頂。

examples.en: The view from the summit was amazing.
examples.zh: 從山頂看到的景色令人驚嘆。

img: climber standing on snowy mountain summit

examples.en: Snow covered the mountain peak.
examples.zh: 雪覆蓋了山峰。

examples.en: That peak is the highest in the area.
examples.zh: 那座山峰是這一帶最高的。

img: sharp rocky mountain peak against sky

examples.en: Don't stand too close to the cliff.
examples.zh: 別站得離懸崖太近。

examples.en: The trail runs along a high cliff.
examples.zh: 步道沿著一道高聳的懸崖延伸。

img: steep rocky cliff overlooking valley

examples.en: A small river runs through the valley.
examples.zh: 一條小河流經山谷。

examples.en: We camped in a green valley.
examples.zh: 我們在一座綠色的山谷中露營。

img: green valley between two mountains

examples.en: We filled our bottles from a clear stream.
examples.zh: 我們在清澈的溪流中裝滿水瓶。

examples.en: The stream was cold and fast.
examples.zh: 這條溪流又冷又急。

img: clear stream flowing over rocks in forest

examples.en: We hiked two hours to see the waterfall.
examples.zh: 我們健行兩小時去看瀑布。

examples.en: The waterfall makes a loud sound.
examples.zh: 瀑布發出很大的聲音。

img: tall waterfall falling into pool

examples.en: Wear strong boots for the rocky trail.
examples.zh: 在多岩石的步道上要穿堅固的靴子。

examples.en: My hiking boots kept my feet dry.
examples.zh: 我的登山靴讓我的腳保持乾爽。

img: muddy hiking boots on rocky path

examples.en: This jacket is fully waterproof.
examples.zh: 這件外套完全防水。

examples.en: Keep your phone in a waterproof bag.
examples.zh: 把你的手機放在防水袋裡。

img: raindrops on waterproof jacket surface

examples.en: Many backpackers visit this hostel.
examples.zh: 許多背包客會來這間旅舍。

examples.en: The backpacker traveled alone for months.
examples.zh: 這位背包客獨自旅行了好幾個月。

img: young backpacker walking on countryside road

examples.en: Our camping trip was a real adventure.
examples.zh: 我們的露營之旅是一場真正的冒險。

examples.en: She loves outdoor adventures.
examples.zh: 她熱愛戶外冒險。

img: hikers exploring wild mountain landscape

examples.en: We looked for shelter from the rain.
examples.zh: 我們尋找躲雨的地方。

examples.en: The cave gave us shelter for the night.
examples.zh: 這個洞穴為我們提供了過夜的遮蔽處。

img: simple wooden shelter in forest

examples.en: We gathered firewood before dark.
examples.zh: 我們在天黑前撿柴火。

examples.en: Dry firewood burns better.
examples.zh: 乾燥的木柴燃燒得更好。

img: pile of dry firewood by campsite

examples.en: We roasted marshmallows over the fire.
examples.zh: 我們在火上烤棉花糖。

examples.en: The marshmallow turned golden brown.
examples.zh: 棉花糖變成了金黃色。

img: marshmallow on stick over campfire

examples.en: We paddled the canoe across the lake.
examples.zh: 我們划獨木舟橫渡湖泊。

examples.en: Two people can fit in this canoe.
examples.zh: 這艘獨木舟可以坐兩個人。

img: wooden canoe on calm lake water

examples.en: We paddled toward the small island.
examples.zh: 我們朝小島划去。

examples.en: Hold the paddle with both hands.
examples.zh: 雙手握住船槳。

img: person paddling kayak on river

examples.en: We walked along the seashore at sunset.
examples.zh: 我們在日落時沿著海濱散步。

examples.en: Shells lay all over the seashore.
examples.zh: 海濱上到處都是貝殼。

img: waves washing over rocky seashore

examples.en: She collected pretty seashells on the beach.
examples.zh: 她在海灘上撿了漂亮的貝殼。

examples.en: This seashell looks like a fan.
examples.zh: 這個貝殼看起來像一把扇子。

img: colorful seashells on sandy beach

examples.en: Green seaweed washed up on the sand.
examples.zh: 綠色的海藻被沖上沙灘。

examples.en: Be careful, the seaweed is slippery.
examples.zh: 小心，海藻很滑。

img: green seaweed on wet beach rocks

examples.en: The tide comes in every afternoon.
examples.zh: 每天下午潮水都會漲上來。

examples.en: We moved our chairs before the tide rose.
examples.zh: 潮水上漲前我們把椅子移開了。

img: ocean tide coming in over sandy beach

examples.en: Put on sunscreen before you swim.
examples.zh: 游泳前先擦防曬乳。

examples.en: This sunscreen protects your skin.
examples.zh: 這款防曬乳能保護你的皮膚。

img: hand applying sunscreen on beach

examples.en: We used a snorkel to watch the fish.
examples.zh: 我們用浮潛呼吸管觀看魚群。

examples.en: Let's snorkel near the reef tomorrow.
examples.zh: 明天我們去珊瑚礁附近浮潛吧。

img: snorkel and mask on tropical beach

examples.en: Spray insect repellent to avoid mosquito bites.
examples.zh: 噴防蟲液以免被蚊子叮咬。

examples.en: Don't forget the insect repellent for camping.
examples.zh: 露營別忘了帶防蟲液。

img: bottle of insect repellent spray outdoors

examples.en: Fill your canteen before the long hike.
examples.zh: 長途健行前把水壺裝滿。

examples.en: His canteen was empty by noon.
examples.zh: 他的水壺到中午就空了。

img: metal canteen water bottle on rock

examples.en: We checked the map at every fork.
examples.zh: 我們在每個岔路都查看地圖。

examples.en: This map shows all the hiking trails.
examples.zh: 這張地圖標示了所有的健行步道。

img: hikers reading paper trail map outdoors

examples.en: Follow this path to the lake.
examples.zh: 沿著這條小路走到湖邊。

examples.en: The path was covered with fallen leaves.
examples.zh: 小路上鋪滿了落葉。

img: winding forest path with fallen leaves

examples.en: We saw lots of wildlife in the forest.
examples.zh: 我們在森林裡看到很多野生動物。

examples.en: Please do not feed the wildlife.
examples.zh: 請不要餵食野生動物。

img: deer and birds in wild forest

examples.en: The mountain scenery was breathtaking.
examples.zh: 山區的景色令人屏息。

examples.en: We stopped to enjoy the scenery.
examples.zh: 我們停下來欣賞風景。

img: wide mountain landscape scenery view

examples.en: We woke up early to watch the sunrise.
examples.zh: 我們早起看日出。

examples.en: The sunrise painted the sky orange.
examples.zh: 日出將天空染成橘色。

img: sunrise over misty mountain peaks

examples.en: The sunset over the sea was beautiful.
examples.zh: 海上的夕陽很美。

examples.en: We reached camp just before sunset.
examples.zh: 我們在日落前剛好抵達營地。

img: colorful sunset over ocean horizon

examples.en: A cool breeze blew through the trees.
examples.zh: 一陣涼爽的微風吹過樹林。

examples.en: The sea breeze felt fresh and cool.
examples.zh: 海風感覺清新又涼爽。

img: grass swaying in gentle breeze outdoors

examples.en: Many insects come out at night.
examples.zh: 許多昆蟲在夜晚出沒。

examples.en: The tent kept the insects out.
examples.zh: 帳篷把昆蟲擋在外面。

img: close up of insect on green leaf

examples.en: We tied the tent down with a rope.
examples.zh: 我們用繩子把帳篷固定住。

examples.en: The climber checked the rope carefully.
examples.zh: 攀登者仔細檢查繩子。

img: thick climbing rope on rock

examples.en: He packed snacks in his knapsack.
examples.zh: 他把點心裝進小背包裡。

examples.en: A light knapsack is easy to carry.
examples.zh: 輕便的小背包很好攜帶。

img: small canvas knapsack on wooden bench

examples.en: We stayed in a wooden cabin by the lake.
examples.zh: 我們住在湖邊的一間小木屋。

examples.en: The cabin had a small fireplace.
examples.zh: 小木屋裡有一個小壁爐。

img: cozy wooden cabin in the woods

examples.en: The kids love playing outdoors.
examples.zh: 孩子們喜歡在戶外玩耍。

examples.en: We spent the whole weekend outdoors.
examples.zh: 我們整個週末都待在戶外。

img: family enjoying activities in the outdoors
